creator: AnarCat@anarcat.dyndns.org
text:
Here is an update for glame. Bumps from 0.2 to 0.5.2! I think there is
good improvement in the software itself, so this one is worth it!

Fix: 1- plain and simple removal of patch-aa.
2- the Makefile

3- the distinfo

4- the plist

So quite a few changes in the plist... 

5- 2 more patches to add to files/

Sadly, these 2 patches must be added to the list of FreeBSD-side
patches:

== patch-ac ==


I have never been using glame yet, so I don't know if this is a "good"
update or not. However, I can say that I didn't use it because there
was no functionality I needed (multitracking, etc).

Now there is. :)

I still have problems running the new version. glame tends to crash
quite a bit...

A.--ClhuLzkfUbozEAiIA6BW8nNjebtGd4Sj2uAGMx90AX22HifB
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.old	Sun Sep 16 14:51:35 2001
+++ Makefile	Sun Sep 16 14:51:04 2001
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	glame
-PORTVERSION=	0.2.0
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.5.2
 CATEGORIES=	audio gnome
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
How-To-Repeat: 
Visit the website and compare version with ports version. :)
